TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Mark_Blount, title = Mark_Blount, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mark_Blount} }

S.FORM: Mark Blount sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1975, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 11, Mark Blount, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Mark Blount sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1975, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 11, Mark Blount, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: mark βlount s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, mark βlount, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
